description: see http://hl7.org/fhir/json.html#schema for information about the FHIR Json Schemas

BodyStructure.description: Record details about an anatomical structure. This resource may be used when a coded concept does not provide the necessary detail needed for the use case.

id.description: The logical id of the resource, as used in the URL for the resource. Once assigned, this value never changes.

meta.description: The metadata about the resource. This is content that is maintained by the infrastructure.

implicitRules.description: A reference to a set of rules that were followed when the resource was constructed.

language.description: The base language in which the resource is written.

text.description: A human-readable narrative that contains a summary of the resource.

contained.description: These resources do not have an independent existence apart from the resource that contains them.

extension.description: May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the resource.

modifierExtension.description: May be used to represent additional information that modifies the understanding of the element that contains it.

identifier.description: Identifier for this instance of the anatomical structure.

active.description: Whether this body site is in active use.

morphology.description: The kind of structure being represented by the body structure at `BodyStructure.location`.

location.description: The anatomical location or region of the specimen, lesion, or body structure.

locationQualifier.description: Qualifier to refine the anatomical location. These include qualifiers for laterality, relative location, directionality, number, and plane.

description.description: A summary, characterization or explanation of the body structure.

image.description: Image or images used to identify a location.

patient.description: The person to which the body site belongs.
